title: neoachmandra idenburgensis
side_effects: Neoachmandra idenburgensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing excessive sedation, which can lead to respiratory depression and decreased cognitive function. Prolonged use of the plant can also cause gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use of neoachmandra idenburgensis can result in cardiovascular complications, including irregular heartbeat and decreased blood pressure. Additionally, it may interact with other medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate underlying health conditions.
